response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a birthday live performance by Mizunashu. 2. Segments 00:00-02:44 identified as intro and story, instrumental. 3. At 02:45, a vocal performance begins. 4. OCR on-screen text '作詞・作曲: Ayase' suggests the composer. The song title '共鳴' (Resonance) appears, but listening to the lyrics 'ああ、いつものように...' confirms the song is actually '群青' (Gunjou) by YOASOBI/Ayase. 5. Searched '群青 YOASOBI lyrics' to obtain full lyrics and 'Gunjou YOASOBI lyrics english translation' for the English version. 6. Populated the JSON with this data.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a story-driven animated intro, followed by a full 3D live vocal performance of the song 'Gunjou' by YOASOBI (Ayase).

scenes.description: Animated story segment introducing the performance. No vocals.
Live 3D vocal performance of 'Gunjou'. Performer Mizunashu sings while dancing. Text '作詞・作曲: Ayase' visible.

どこか虚しいような

つまらないな

そんなもんさ

知らず知らず隠してた
本当の声を響かせてよ、ほら
見ないフリしていても
確かにそこにある
感じたままに描く
自分で選んだその色で

訪れた青い世界
好きなものを好きだと言う
怖くて仕方ないけど
本当の自分
出会えた気がしたんだ
嗚呼、手を伸ばせば伸ばすほどに
遠くへゆく
思うようにいかない今日も
また慌ただしくもがいてる
悔しい気持ちも

涙が出る
踏み込むほど
苦しくなる
痛くもなる
感じたままに進む
自分で選んだこの道を
重いまぶた擦る夜に
しがみついた青い誓い
好きなことを続けること
それは楽しいだけじゃない
本当にできる？
不安になるけど
何枚でも
ほら何枚でも
自信がないから描いてきたんだよ
何回でも
ほら何回でも
積み上げてきたことが武器になる
周りを見たって
誰と比べたって
僕にしかできないことはなんだ
今でも自信なんかない
感じたことない気持ち
知らずにいた想い
あの日踏み出して
初めて感じたこの痛みも全部
好きなものと向き合うことで
触れたまだ小さな光
大丈夫行こうあとは楽しむだけだ
全てを賭けて描く
自分にしか出せない色で
朝も夜も走り続け
見つけ出した青い光
好きなものと向き合うこと
今だって怖いことだけど
もう今はあの日の透明な僕じゃない
かけがえの無い僕だ
知らず知らず隠してた

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, just like usual
These passing days make me yawn
After a night of merriment, today again
Morning falls upon Shibuya city
Feeling somewhat empty
Such a feeling bores me
But that is all right
It is what it is
I prefer it this way
Inadvertently hiding your real voice
Let me hear it resonate, come on
Pretending won't bring it out of sight
It is always waiting there
Drawing as I feel
Using the colors I chose myself
In a morning wearing a drowsy atmosphere
A blue world visited me
Saying you like what you love
It is too terrifying
But I felt like I finally met
The true me
Ah, the more I reach out my hands
The further away it goes
Another unruly day
I am struggling again, flustered
Even this frustrated feeling
Is just pathetic
And brings tears to my eyes
The more I step into it
The harder it gets
The more painful it becomes
Moving forward as I feel
On this path I chose myself
On a night fighting off heavy eyelids
I grabbed onto a blue vow
To keep doing what I love
It is not just fun all the time
Can I really do it?
I get anxious, but
No matter how many times
Look, no matter how many times
I drew because I lacked confidence
No matter how many times
Look, no matter how many times
What I've accumulated becomes my weapon
Even if I look around
Even if I compare myself to others
What is it that only I can do?
Even now, I have no confidence
But I have feelings I've never felt before
Thoughts I didn't know
The day I took that step
Including all the pain I felt for the first time
By facing what I love
I touched a still-small light
It will be all right, let's go
All I have left to do is enjoy it
Betting everything as I draw
With the colors only I can produce
Running continuously, morning and night
I found that blue light
Facing what I love
It is still scary even now
But now I am no longer that transparent self from that day
I am my own incomparable self
Inadvertently hiding your real voice
Let me hear it resonate, come on
Pretending won't bring it out of sight
It is definitely there, even now, it is there
Inadvertently hiding your real voice
Let me hear it resonate, come on
Pretending won't bring it out of sight
It is definitely there, inside you.
